# Starboard — full agent brief

GitHub stars organizer with semantic search — sub-product of CodeVetter for repo intelligence.

## Index

# Starboard

GitHub stars organizer + semantic search (CodeVetter sub-product).

## What it is

- Organize and search starred repositories
- Semantic search over star metadata

## Agent entrypoints

- https://starboard.codevetter.com/llms.txt
- https://starboard.codevetter.com/api/ai
- https://starboard.codevetter.com/index.md

## Product links

- Home: https://starboard.codevetter.com/ — Product
- CodeVetter: https://codevetter.com/ — Parent product

## Machine surfaces

- https://starboard.codevetter.com/llms.txt
- https://starboard.codevetter.com/llms-full.txt
- https://starboard.codevetter.com/api/ai
- https://starboard.codevetter.com/index.md
- https://starboard.codevetter.com/sitemap.xml
- https://starboard.codevetter.com/robots.txt
